primary_operations.name: save
primary_operations.sdk_call: await this._pool.query('INSERT INTO t(id, name) VALUES ($1, $2) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name', [record.id, record.name]);

primary_operations.name: findById
primary_operations.sdk_call: const r = await this._pool.query('SELECT * FROM t WHERE id = $1', [id]); return (r.rows[0] as Record<string, unknown>) ?? null;

primary_operations.name: del
primary_operations.sdk_call: await this._pool.query('DELETE FROM t WHERE id = $1', [id]);

code_style_notes: pg ships @types/pg via its own package
